blended.narrative: Burke Mountain is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 14 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 46°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Friday: 2.1" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect variable conditions.
Saturday: 2.1" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
Tuesday: 5" of snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
